summary: Frontend-only verification of Round 3 — 6 platform-specific AI marketing landing pages at /{instagram,facebook,linkedin,reddit,youtube,tiktok}-marketing-ai. All 6 routes render via SeoLandingTemplate with correct unique <title>, spec-matching H1 (h1_lead + h1_accent), 6 body sections (seo-landing-section-0..5), 3 internal-link cards with marketing-os ALWAYS first, 4 valid parseable JSON-LD blocks (Organization, SoftwareApplication, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage), final CTA, footer Channels column with all 6 platform links and footer Platform column intact with the 5 Round-2 links. Internal-link click (tiktok→instagram), footer channel-link click (reddit→linkedin), marketing-os internal-link (youtube→marketing-os), and primary CTA → /dashboard all navigate correctly with title/H1 updating to the destination page. Sitemap.xml at /api/seo/sitemap.xml lists all 6 platform routes. 6/6 pages PASS — 100% success rate.

design_issues.screen: All platform pages (head, carried over from iter31)
issues: Duplicate <meta name='description'> tag from public/index.html still present alongside react-helmet's per-page description. Non-blocking — og:description is unique per page.

critical_code_review_comments: platform-ai/index.js (23 lines) is a clean named-export module reusing the validated SeoLandingTemplate; no per-platform logic duplicated.
All 6 JSON content files have __meta__ with correct slug/title/h1_lead/h1_accent, 6 sections each, and internal_links[0].slug === 'marketing-os' on every page as required by the spec.

Internal-link sibling pairs are well distributed (each platform links to marketing-os + 2 siblings): IG→[mos,tt,fb], FB→[mos,ig,tt], LI→[mos,rd,yt], RD→[mos,li,yt], YT→[mos,tt,li], TT→[mos,ig,yt]. No self-references.

CVFooter footer-channel-links column renders all 6 platform routes with per-link data-testids (footer-link-<slug>); footer-platform-links still has the 5 Round-2 routes — both columns verified at runtime.
Sitemap.xml served by /api/seo/sitemap.xml lists all 6 platform routes (pre-registered in Round 1).
Body word counts ~750-870 per page (under 1000 spec target) — per main agent note this is non-blocking; content quality and structural completeness verified.
test_credentials: N/A — public pages, no auth required
context_for_next_testing_agent: Round 3 (6 platform-specific landing pages: instagram/facebook/linkedin/reddit/youtube/tiktok-marketing-ai) fully verified at iteration_32 — titles, H1s, 4 JSON-LD blocks, 6 sections, 3 internal links (first always marketing-os), final CTA, footer channels column, and all click-navigation flows confirmed working. No regression in Round 2 pages or footer-platform-links column. Sitemap.xml still complete. Pre-existing iter31 nit about duplicate <meta name='description'> from public/index.html persists but is non-blocking.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. (Note for next agent: react-helmet updates document.title and component-driven H1 asynchronously after route navigation; when scripting click-navigation assertions, wait_for_function on document.title or H1 textContent instead of reading immediately after wait_for_url, or you'll get the previous page's stale values even though the URL has updated.)
